utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check full specification:
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — OK.
- travel_dates: Provided (July 10-14, 2024) — Specific dates given; note it states 5-day trip in user task but dates cover 5 days/4 nights; still counts as provided — OK.
- transportation: Has description and cost (€800). Lacks exact flight details (airline is generic “Standard Airlines,” no flight numbers, times). The format asks “flight details with costs.” This is under-specified — NOT OK.
- accommodation: Hotel name, details, duration (5 nights), and cost (€750) — OK.
- activities: Listed with names and individual costs — OK.
- additional_services: Description and cost (€20) — OK.
- total_budget: Given as a single number (€1700) but “complete cost breakdown” is requested. While individual sections have costs, there is no explicit summed breakdown line-by-line; however, totals of components can be inferred (800+750+20+30+80+20=€1700). Since breakdown is effectively covered via itemized costs plus total, this is reasonably specified — OK.
Thus, 6 of 7 items are fully specified; transportation lacks detailed flight info.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic' which matches the destinations list; transportation is 'Standard Airlines, Economy Class' which corresponds to transportation.standard_airlines.Economy Class; accommodation is 'Cityscape Hotel' which appears in accommodation; activities include 'City Walking Tour' and 'Museum Day Pass' which are in activities, plus 'Zoo (for 2 adults and 2 children)' which does not appear in ground-truth and thus cannot be mapped; additional services describe meals/incidental self-catering which doesn't match any additional_hotel_services item. Therefore, map only the items that exist in the ground-truth.
